description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image with a single build stage. Add a before_script that runs make deps for every job. In the build stage define a compiled_varroa_dev job that runs make build-bin, stores the files varroa, varroa_bash_completion, varroa-fuse, and varroa.user.js as artifacts named varroa-dev-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} that expire after 4 weeks, and executes on all branches except tags. Also define a compiled_varroa_released_version job that runs the same make build-bin command, publishes the same artifact paths under the name varroa-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, and runs only when a tag is pushed.
